anomalies.adult_mortality_scaled_country_years: array of objects {iso3: string, years: array of integers}
anomalies.bmi_scaled_country_years: array of objects {iso3: string, years: array of integers}
anomalies.complete_gdp_gap_iso3: array of ISO3 strings sorted ascending

pca.cluster_counts: object with integer keys low_burden, middle_burden, high_burden
pca.missing_rate_by_variable: object keyed by retained-variable candidate ids; values rounded to 3 decimals
pca.top_absolute_loadings: array of three variable ids ordered by absolute loading descending
pca.top_positive_loadings: array of three variable ids ordered by loading descending
pca.variables_retained: array in analysis order; allowed retained variables: adult_mortality, bmi, alcohol, health_expenditure, immunization, schooling, income_composition, gdp, population, infant_mortality
